sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: New RUN Key Pointing to Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious new RUN key element pointing to an executable in a suspicious folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects when an attacker or tool disables the  Windows Defender service (WinDefend) via the registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Ján Trenčanský, frack113, AlertIQ, Nasreddine Bencherchali

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: ADS Zone.Identifier Deleted By Uncommon Application
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the deletion of the "Zone.Identifier" ADS by an uncommon process. Attackers can leverage this in order to bypass security restrictions that make use of the ADS such as Microsoft Office apps.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Disable Microsoft Defender Firewall via Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may disable or modify system firewalls in order to bypass controls limiting network usage
A General detection for files being created in the Windows startup directory. This could be an indicator of persistence.
Detects when an attacker tries to disable User Account Control (UAC) by setting the registry value "EnableLUA" to 0.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Disable Internal Tools or Feature in Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects registry modifications that change features of internal Windows tools (malware like Agent Tesla uses this technique)
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects when an attacker tries to disable User Account Control (UAC) notification by tampering with the "UACDisableNotify" value.
UAC is a critical security feature in Windows that prevents unauthorized changes to the operating system. It prompts the user for permission or an administrator password before allowing actions that could affect the system's operation or change settings that affect other users.
When "UACDisableNotify" is set to 1, UAC prompts are suppressed.
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Zeus GameOver Possible DGA NXDOMAIN Responses
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp any 53 -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Zeus GameOver Possible DGA NXDOMAIN Responses"; byte_test:1,&,128,2; byte_test:1,&,1,3; byte_test:1,&,2,3; content:"|00 01 00 00 00 01|"; offset:4; depth:6; pcre:"/^..[\x0d-\x20][a-z]{13,32}(?:\x03(?:biz|com|net|org)|\x04info|\x02ru)\x00\x00\x01\x00\x01/Rs"; threshold: type both, track by_dst, count 12, seconds 120; reference:url,vrt-blog.snort.org/2014/03/decoding-domain-generation-algorithms.html; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2018316; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2014_03_25, updated_at 2014_03_25;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp any 53 -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Possible Zeus GameOver/FluBot Related DGA NXDOMAIN Responses"; byte_test:1,&,128,2; byte_test:1,&,1,3; byte_test:1,&,2,3; content:"|00 01 00 00 00 01|"; offset:4; depth:6; pcre:"/^..[\x0d-\x20][a-z]{13,32}(?:\x03(?:biz|com|net|org)|\x04info|\x02ru)\x00\x00\x01\x00\x01/Rs"; threshold: type both, track by_dst, count 12, seconds 120; reference:url,vrt-blog.snort.org/2014/03/decoding-domain-generation-algorithms.html; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2018316; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2014_03_25, former_category MALWARE, updated_at 2014_03_25;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET 80 ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC Win.Trojan.RansomCrypt variant outbound connection"; flow:to_server,established; http_raw_uri; bufferlen:1; http_client_body; content:"form-data|3B| name=|22|cmd|22 0D 0A 0D 0A|cr|0D 0A|--",depth 100; content:"--|0D 0A|",within 4,distance 20; http_header; content:"Media Center PC 6.0|3B| MASE)|0D 0A|"; metadata:impact_flag red; service:http; reference:url,www.virustotal.com/en/file/9df6a1f3eef45d15f9a3c587b3fa0ef02c25b40da8c8c87293e5c442c991fd6c/analysis/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:29146; rev:2; )
